name: Sahib ❤️
greetingText: wishing you the happiest birthday ever 💗
wishText: Happy 20th birthday, my love. It still amazes me how we started as best friends and slowly became something so much more. These past three years with you have been the most beautiful part of my life. We have seen so many ups and downs together, and yet somehow we could never stay away from each other for long. No matter what happened, something always kept bringing us back together. It feels like we simply can’t survive without each other, and honestly, I wouldn’t want to. Watching you grow and step into your twenties makes me feel so proud of you. I hope this new chapter brings you success, happiness, and everything you dream of. Even after all the difficult moments, we are still here, still holding on, and I truly hope life keeps us together like this forever. Thank you for being my best friend, my partner, and my favorite person. I love you more than yeshtaday less than tomorrow baby🥺❤️
textInChatBox: Happy birthday to the boy who makes me smile every day ❤️
text2: Because you mean the world to me bbg 🥺❤️
text3: Because you are someone who quietly became the most beautiful part of my life.
text5Content: I love you more than anything baby 🥺
outroText: Okay, now come back and tell me if you liked it
replayText: Or click, if bbg wants to  watch it again😋.( remember bden e na dende aseyo tusi huh 😠 told you zaroori ae huhh i love youu sooo muchhhhh💗
